source.description: Original parking-floor guide screenshot supplied by the user.

readability.note: Parking zones and facilities are usable visually, but individual small stall labels should not be treated as verified data.

notes: Small parking stall/zone labels are too faint to extract reliably from this screenshot; only coarse amenity classes are recorded.
Area polygons were traced from exact-color screenshot regions. Their association with transcribed store names remains pending manual review.
